regions.name: main_menu
regions.notes: Title, button labels, focus state, hover state, save-slot state, platform prompts, and localization remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: gameplay_enemy
regions.notes: Enemy name, portrait, health, intent, buffs, debuffs, and targeting state remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: gameplay_player_status
regions.notes: Hero portrait, health, armor, energy, buffs, debuffs, and values remain live.

regions.name: gameplay_card_hand
regions.notes: Card art, names, rules text, costs, rarity, targeting, and playability remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: gameplay_end_turn
regions.notes: Button label, enablement, hotkey text, and localization remain runtime-owned.
